setting.note: Austen’s Bath, named street by street: Camden Place, the Pump Room, Milsom Street, the White Hart. The novel also carries Anne Elliot to the Cobb at Lyme Regis, where Louisa falls. It brings both Bath and Jane Austen into the atlas.
